gui.spoticraft.not_logged: It seems you aren't logged in, press the button bellow to log yourself.
gui.spoticraft.no_premium: It seems that you don't have Spotify Premium on this account, you need Spotify Premium to use this mod.
gui.spoticraft.no_premium_2: Click the button bellow if you want to change account.
gui.spoticraft.token_expired: Your token didn't successfully refreshed, try to log yourself in again
gui.spoticraft.authorization_issue: Spotify accepted the login, but the mod could not use this session yet.
gui.spoticraft.authorization_issue_2: Open the browser again and re-authorize the mod.
gui.spoticraft.partial_playlist_access: Spotify only allowed part of this playlist to load.
